title: Better christmas
description: modpack to bring winter to all biomes and optimize it
body:
This modpack adds a mods to make everything snowy and a few changes to defaul textures to make everything look more natural in world fully covered in snow and It adds many optimization mods to play without lag 

<details>
<summary>!Important!</summary>

This modpack uses nvidium mod that works only with nvidia graphics cards more details here:
[Nvidium mod info/link](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)


</details>
